enabled.description: Whether Classic schema binding is active (§3.1).

mode.description: Classic schema binding mode (§3.1). strict: all top-level parameters must exactly match the classic template. hybrid: classic values serve as defaults, top-level may override within Global System Constraints.

rows.description: Number of ranks (rows) per column. Default: 2. Max: 12 (§3.3).

columns.description: Number of columns per player board. Default: 4. Max: 12 (§3.3).

maxHandSize.description: Maximum hand size. Must be ≤ columns (§3.3). Default: 4.

initialDraw.description: Cards drawn at match start. Formula: rows × columns + columns (§3.3). Default: 12.

classicAces.description: Enable Classic Ace rules: Aces only destroyed by other Aces at rank 0 (§10).

classicFaceCards.description: Enable Classic Face Card rules: J→J, Q→J/Q, K→J/Q/K destruction hierarchy (§11).

damagePersistence.description: Damage mode. classic: no HP persists between turns. cumulative: damage persists (§12).

deployFirst.description: Which player deploys first in DeploymentPhase.

attackFirst.description: Which player attacks first in AttackPhase.

maxConsecutivePasses.description: Maximum consecutive passes before automatic forfeit (§16). Default: 3.

maxTotalPassesPerPlayer.description: Maximum total passes per player before automatic forfeit (§16). Default: 5.

rows.description: Number of ranks per column (§3.3). Min: 1, Max: 12. rows × columns ≤ 48.

columns.description: Number of columns per player board (§3.3). Min: 1, Max: 12. rows × columns ≤ 48.

maxHandSize.description: Maximum hand size. Must be ≤ columns (§3.3).

initialDraw.description: Cards drawn at match start. Must equal rows × columns + columns (§3.3).

modeClassicFaceCards.description: Enable Classic Face Card destruction hierarchy (§11).

modeClassicDeployment.description: Enable Classic Deployment: alternating card placement (§5).

modeQuickStart.description: Skip deployment phase with a pre-filled battlefield.

enabled.description: Enable Special Start Mode: no-attack does not count as pass until first forced reinforcement (§7).

noAttackCountsAsPassUntil.description: Condition for closing the Special Start window. Default: bothPlayersCompletedFirstForcedReinforcement.

deployFirst.description: Which player deploys first in DeploymentPhase.

attackFirst.description: Which player attacks first in AttackPhase.

maxConsecutivePasses.description: Maximum consecutive passes before automatic forfeit (§16).

maxTotalPassesPerPlayer.description: Maximum total passes per player before automatic forfeit (§16).

id.description: Unique player identifier (UUID v4). Used for session binding and reconnection.
Opaque deterministic card ID. Format: [Timestamp]::[MatchID]::[PlayerID]::[TurnNumber]::[CardType]. Generated at draw-time. No card info is encoded to prevent leakage on face-down cards.

suit.description: Card suit. Determines boundary effects during attack resolution: ♦ Diamond (double defense at Card→Card boundary), ♥ Heart (death shield at Card→Player boundary), ♣ Club (double overflow after first destruction), ♠ Spade (double LP damage at Card→Player boundary). See RULES.md §9.

face.description: Card face symbol. One of: A (Ace), 2-9, T (Ten), J (Jack), Q (Queen), K (King). Maps to value via RANK_VALUES lookup.

value.description: Numeric combat value. A=1, 2-9=face value, T=10, J/Q/K=11. Used as base damage in attack resolution.

type.description: Card type classification. Governs destruction eligibility under Classic Aces (§10) and Classic Face Cards (§11) rules. Aces are only destroyed by other aces at rank 0. Face cards follow a hierarchy: J→J, Q→J/Q, K→J/Q/K.

hand.description: Cards in hand. Visible only to the owner; redacted for opponents and spectators (§21.1).

id.description: Opaque deterministic card ID. Format: [Timestamp]::[MatchID]::[PlayerID]::[TurnNumber]::[CardType]. Generated at draw-time. No card info is encoded to prevent leakage on face-down cards.

suit.description: Card suit. Determines boundary effects during attack resolution: ♦ Diamond (double defense at Card→Card boundary), ♥ Heart (death shield at Card→Player boundary), ♣ Club (double overflow after first destruction), ♠ Spade (double LP damage at Card→Player boundary). See RULES.md §9.

face.description: Card face symbol. One of: A (Ace), 2-9, T (Ten), J (Jack), Q (Queen), K (King). Maps to value via RANK_VALUES lookup.

value.description: Numeric combat value. A=1, 2-9=face value, T=10, J/Q/K=11. Used as base damage in attack resolution.

type.description: Card type classification. Governs destruction eligibility under Classic Aces (§10) and Classic Face Cards (§11) rules. Aces are only destroyed by other aces at rank 0. Face cards follow a hierarchy: J→J, Q→J/Q, K→J/Q/K.

row.description: Rank index within a column (0 = front, facing opponent). Max 11 per Global System Constraints §3.3.

col.description: Column index on the battlefield. Max 11 per Global System Constraints §3.3.

currentHp.description: Current hit points. Equals card value at deployment. Reduced by incoming damage during attack resolution. Card is destroyed when reduced to 0 (subject to destruction eligibility rules §10-11).

faceDown.description: Whether the card is face-down. In standard play, all deployed cards are face-up (false). See §21.2.

battlefield.description: Battlefield grid slots. Array of rows × columns elements. null = empty slot. Visible to all (§21.2).

suit.description: Card suit. Determines boundary effects during attack resolution: ♦ Diamond (double defense at Card→Card boundary), ♥ Heart (death shield at Card→Player boundary), ♣ Club (double overflow after first destruction), ♠ Spade (double LP damage at Card→Player boundary). See RULES.md §9.

face.description: Card face symbol. One of: A (Ace), 2-9, T (Ten), J (Jack), Q (Queen), K (King). Maps to value via RANK_VALUES lookup.

value.description: Numeric combat value. A=1, 2-9=face value, T=10, J/Q/K=11. Used as base damage in attack resolution.

type.description: Card type classification. Governs destruction eligibility under Classic Aces (§10) and Classic Face Cards (§11) rules. Aces are only destroyed by other aces at rank 0. Face cards follow a hierarchy: J→J, Q→J/Q, K→J/Q/K.

drawpile.description: Remaining draw pile. Always hidden from all players and spectators (§21.1).

id.description: Opaque deterministic card ID. Format: [Timestamp]::[MatchID]::[PlayerID]::[TurnNumber]::[CardType]. Generated at draw-time. No card info is encoded to prevent leakage on face-down cards.

suit.description: Card suit. Determines boundary effects during attack resolution: ♦ Diamond (double defense at Card→Card boundary), ♥ Heart (death shield at Card→Player boundary), ♣ Club (double overflow after first destruction), ♠ Spade (double LP damage at Card→Player boundary). See RULES.md §9.

face.description: Card face symbol. One of: A (Ace), 2-9, T (Ten), J (Jack), Q (Queen), K (King). Maps to value via RANK_VALUES lookup.

value.description: Numeric combat value. A=1, 2-9=face value, T=10, J/Q/K=11. Used as base damage in attack resolution.

type.description: Card type classification. Governs destruction eligibility under Classic Aces (§10) and Classic Face Cards (§11) rules. Aces are only destroyed by other aces at rank 0. Face cards follow a hierarchy: J→J, Q→J/Q, K→J/Q/K.

discardPile.description: Destroyed cards. Owner sees full pile; others see only top card and count (§21.3).

lifepoints.description: Current life points. Starts at startingLifepoints (default 20). Game ends at 0 (lpDepletion victory).

deckSeed.description: Deterministic RNG seed for deck shuffling. Ensures replay reproducibility.

handCount.description: Public: number of cards in hand. Visible to all players and spectators.

drawpileCount.description: Public: number of cards remaining in draw pile.

discardPileCount.description: Public: number of cards in discard pile.

players.description: Exactly 2 player states. Index 0 = P1 (inviting), Index 1 = P2 (invited).

activePlayerIndex.description: Index of the player whose turn it is (0 or 1).

anyOf.description: Deterministic turn lifecycle phase (RULES.md §4). Each turn executes all 7 phases in order: StartTurn → DeploymentPhase → AttackPhase → AttackResolution → CleanupPhase → ReinforcementPhase → DrawPhase → EndTurn. Player actions are only valid in specific phases.

phase.description: Current game phase. One of the 7 turn lifecycle phases or gameOver. The gameOver phase is terminal and set when a victory condition is met (LP depletion, card depletion, forfeit, or pass limit).

turnNumber.description: Current turn number. Starts at 0 (deployment) and increments each full turn cycle.

gameOptions.description: Runtime game option overrides applied at match creation.

damageMode.description: Damage persistence mode (§12). classic: card HP resets each turn. cumulative: damage persists across turns.

startingLifepoints.description: Starting life points per player. Default: 20. Range: 1-500.

classicDeployment.description: Enable Classic Deployment Mode: alternating card placement until battlefield full (§5).

quickStart.description: If true, skip deployment and start with a pre-filled battlefield.

reinforcement.description: Present only during ReinforcementPhase. Indicates which column requires reinforcement after cleanup (§14).

column.description: Column index where reinforcement is occurring.

attackerIndex.description: Index of the player who triggered the reinforcement via attack.

passState.description: Pass tracking state for modePassRules enforcement (§16).

consecutivePasses.description: Consecutive pass count per player [P1, P2]. Resets on non-pass action.

totalPasses.description: Lifetime total pass count per player [P1, P2].

transactionLog.description: Ordered log of all actions applied to this match. Each entry contains state hashes for replay verification (§18).

cardId.description: ID of the card to deploy from hand.

oneOf.description: Deploy a card from hand. Valid during DeploymentPhase. Each player must alternate deploying cards until the battlefield is full according to match parameters.

attackingColumn.description: Column index containing the attacking card. Must have a non-null card at rank 0.

defendingColumn.description: Target column index on the opponent board.

oneOf.description: Declare an attack. Valid during AttackPhase. Requires a card at rank 0 of the attacking column.
Pass the current turn. Valid during AttackPhase. Excessive consecutive or total passes will result in a forfeit.

cardId.description: ID of the card to deploy from hand.

oneOf.description: Reinforce a column after cleanup. Valid during ReinforcementPhase. Cards are deployed to the back-most empty rank of the column.
Immediately forfeit the match. Valid in any phase.

action.description: Authoritative action payload for Phalanx: Duel.

anyOf.description: Deterministic turn lifecycle phase (RULES.md §4). Each turn executes all 7 phases in order: StartTurn → DeploymentPhase → AttackPhase → AttackResolution → CleanupPhase → ReinforcementPhase → DrawPhase → EndTurn. Player actions are only valid in specific phases.

phaseAfter.description: Current game phase. One of the 7 turn lifecycle phases or gameOver. The gameOver phase is terminal and set when a victory condition is met (LP depletion, card depletion, forfeit, or pass limit).

id.description: Opaque deterministic card ID. Format: [Timestamp]::[MatchID]::[PlayerID]::[TurnNumber]::[CardType]. Generated at draw-time. No card info is encoded to prevent leakage on face-down cards.

suit.description: Card suit. Determines boundary effects during attack resolution: ♦ Diamond (double defense at Card→Card boundary), ♥ Heart (death shield at Card→Player boundary), ♣ Club (double overflow after first destruction), ♠ Spade (double LP damage at Card→Player boundary). See RULES.md §9.

face.description: Card face symbol. One of: A (Ace), 2-9, T (Ten), J (Jack), Q (Queen), K (King). Maps to value via RANK_VALUES lookup.

value.description: Numeric combat value. A=1, 2-9=face value, T=10, J/Q/K=11. Used as base damage in attack resolution.

type.description: Card type classification. Governs destruction eligibility under Classic Aces (§10) and Classic Face Cards (§11) rules. Aces are only destroyed by other aces at rank 0. Face cards follow a hierarchy: J→J, Q→J/Q, K→J/Q/K.

id.description: Opaque deterministic card ID. Format: [Timestamp]::[MatchID]::[PlayerID]::[TurnNumber]::[CardType]. Generated at draw-time. No card info is encoded to prevent leakage on face-down cards.

suit.description: Card suit. Determines boundary effects during attack resolution: ♦ Diamond (double defense at Card→Card boundary), ♥ Heart (death shield at Card→Player boundary), ♣ Club (double overflow after first destruction), ♠ Spade (double LP damage at Card→Player boundary). See RULES.md §9.

face.description: Card face symbol. One of: A (Ace), 2-9, T (Ten), J (Jack), Q (Queen), K (King). Maps to value via RANK_VALUES lookup.

value.description: Numeric combat value. A=1, 2-9=face value, T=10, J/Q/K=11. Used as base damage in attack resolution.

type.description: Card type classification. Governs destruction eligibility under Classic Aces (§10) and Classic Face Cards (§11) rules. Aces are only destroyed by other aces at rank 0. Face cards follow a hierarchy: J→J, Q→J/Q, K→J/Q/K.

items.description: Combat bonus applied during attack resolution. Maps to suit boundary effects (§9) and destruction eligibility rules (§10-11).

anyOf.description: Deterministic turn lifecycle phase (RULES.md §4). Each turn executes all 7 phases in order: StartTurn → DeploymentPhase → AttackPhase → AttackResolution → CleanupPhase → ReinforcementPhase → DrawPhase → EndTurn. Player actions are only valid in specific phases.

from.description: Current game phase. One of the 7 turn lifecycle phases or gameOver. The gameOver phase is terminal and set when a victory condition is met (LP depletion, card depletion, forfeit, or pass limit).

anyOf.description: Deterministic turn lifecycle phase (RULES.md §4). Each turn executes all 7 phases in order: StartTurn → DeploymentPhase → AttackPhase → AttackResolution → CleanupPhase → ReinforcementPhase → DrawPhase → EndTurn. Player actions are only valid in specific phases.

to.description: Current game phase. One of the 7 turn lifecycle phases or gameOver. The gameOver phase is terminal and set when a victory condition is met (LP depletion, card depletion, forfeit, or pass limit).

outcome.description: Match outcome. Present only when phase is gameOver.

winnerIndex.description: Index of the winning player (0 or 1).

victoryType.description: Victory condition type. lpDepletion: opponent LP reaches 0. cardDepletion: opponent has no cards on battlefield or in hand. forfeit: player explicitly forfeits. passLimit: player exceeds maxConsecutivePasses or maxTotalPassesPerPlayer (§16).

turnNumber.description: Turn number when victory was achieved.
